title: bupleurum stenophyllum
intro: Bupleurum stenophyllum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or bupleurum root, is a plant species belonging to the genus Bupleurum in the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Bupleurum stenophyllum is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, and has been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Bupleurum stenophyllum is commonly prepared as a decoction or extract, often in combination with other herbs, to be taken as a tea or supplement.
